EmailTemplate.description: Email for outstanding balance on policy.
EmailTemplate.name: CA Payment Required
EmailTemplate.subject: Please Contact Us
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We are getting in touch today as we believe that there is an outstanding balance of £0.00 owed for policy {!Policy__c.Id}.
We would love to discuss this with you with a view to getting this resolved. Could you please call us on 01242 808740, or alternatively, let us know a convenient time for us to call you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
